description: arXiv:2607.20493v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Deep learning has led to remarkable progress in artificial intelligence, particularly in robotics, imaging and sound processing. However, a major limitation of neural networks remains their strong dependence on large and stationary datasets. In many real-world applications, these conditions are rarely met due to evolving and dynamic environments w...
author: Quentin Besnard (RFAI), Nicolas Ragot (RFAI)
